arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister drops Liverpool team news hint for Chelsea after injury worry

arts.ttl: Furious Mainz ultras take shot at former manager Jurgen Klopp with new banners at RB Leipzig clash as the ex-Liverpool boss takes up new Red Bull role
arts.sum: After leaving his post at Liverpool at the end of the 2023-24 season, Klopp spent a few months out of work before taking up a role as Red Bull's new Global Head of football.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Palmer: 'Cold' celly about passion, joy
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Cole Palmer has explained why he performs his signature "cold" celebration after each goal, saying it is about showing the "joy" of football.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes claim over contracts 'full picture' as Liverpool face anxious wait on three deals
arts.sum: The Liverpool head coach has spoken about contract situations of Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Chelsea combined XI: Reds dominate the defence as Cole Palmer and Mo Salah feature in a star-studded forward line - but which £100m man misses out?
arts.sum: Since only players who are available for selection are included, Alisson Becker misses the cut, due to injury with Marc Cucurella unavailable through suspension.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer raises alarm bells over ‘crazy’ Liverpool situation and admits ‘we’re all amazed'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's future is up in the air as he has failed to agree a new deal at Liverpool, and Alan Shearer is amazed that the Reds have allowed the situation to get this far

arts.ttl: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca singles out winger for praise ahead of Liverpool game
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca singles out one of his wingers for praise ahead of the Blues' Sunday showdown at Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Villarreal ‘thinking about’ making summer approach for Chelsea central midfielder
arts.sum: Cesare Casadei is attracting interest from two different countries, including Spain’s Villarreal. The La Liga side have hopes of signing the 21-year-old Chelsea midfielder. Since joining the Blues in 2022, the young Italian has struggled to break into the first team.
